readiness_layers.name: Governed Entry Shell Readiness
readiness_layers.implementation_boundary: May define entry shell requirements later; no shell code may be created in this gate.

readiness_layers.name: Intent and Context Intake Readiness
readiness_layers.implementation_boundary: May define intent schema later; no live intake, voice capture or command execution in this gate.

readiness_layers.name: Governed Manual and Memory Dependency Readiness
readiness_layers.implementation_boundary: Manual remains read-only governed dependency; no manual mutation in this gate.

readiness_layers.name: Panel Map and UI Blueprint Readiness
readiness_layers.implementation_boundary: May prepare future wireframe requirements; no front-end files or dashboard runtime in this gate.

readiness_layers.name: Authorization and Safety Policy Readiness
readiness_layers.implementation_boundary: May define authorization contracts later; no live authorization runtime in this gate.

readiness_layers.name: Dry Action Router Readiness
readiness_layers.implementation_boundary: May define dry-run router requirements later; no OS/app/browser/file actions in this gate.

readiness_layers.name: Evidence, Audit and Rollback Readiness
readiness_layers.implementation_boundary: May define future evidence contract; no deployment, runtime, rollback execution or source implementation in this gate.

readiness_workstreams.name: Requirements Traceability
readiness_workstreams.output_blocked_now: Source files, implementation tasks, runtime hooks.

readiness_workstreams.name: Data and State Contract Planning
readiness_workstreams.output_blocked_now: Creating schemas or source code files.

readiness_risks.risk: Blueprint converted directly into implementation without separate source gate.
readiness_risks.mitigation: Fail-closed: next gates must remain planning/audit before any source mutation.

readiness_risks.risk: Interface build accidentally created during readiness.
readiness_risks.mitigation: Output scope limited to report, readiness document, manifest, seal and summary.

readiness_risks.risk: Runtime, ARGOS or dashboard accidentally executed.
readiness_risks.mitigation: All runtime flags remain false and no runtime command is invoked.

readiness_risks.risk: Manual mutation performed while treating manual as dependency.
readiness_risks.mitigation: Manual paths are checked and blocked.

readiness_risks.risk: Buttons treated as live actions instead of blueprint/readiness definitions.
readiness_risks.mitigation: Button runtime remains blocked; future button contracts require separate gate.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Blueprint lifecycle closed and available as governed dependency.
Seven readiness layers mapped to the seven blueprint layers.
Risk controls defined for source, runtime, interface, ARGOS, manual and productive boundaries.
No implementation is authorized or performed.
No source/manual/runtime/interface/ARGOS/productive mutation is authorized or performed.

checks.detail: Repo clean and synced before readiness definition.
Blueprint close validation confirms lifecycle closed.
Blueprint text contains required sections, layers, panels and blocked action tokens.
Implementation is not authorized or performed.
Manual mutation, source mutation, runtime, interface build, ARGOS and productive actions remain blocked.
Next safe step is readiness post-build audit, not implementation.
Readiness output scope is exactly report, readiness document, manifest, seal and summary.
